subject: Why I stopped trusting EAs (and what I did)
preview: Una storia veloce. Forse ti ci ritrovi.
body:
[Nome], a quick story.

Like many, I bought trading robots that promised wonders. They were black boxes: I had no idea what they did, why they entered trades, or when they exited.

And when they lost, I was left in the dark. That’s the real nightmare: watching your account shrink without understanding why.

So I decided to build the opposite. A system that shows **everything**: every trade explained, the true history, even the losing years. And an AI that answers every question, in your language.

Tomorrow, I’ll explain the concept that separates a real strategy from one that’s just ‘glued’ to the past. It’s the difference between a serious system and a scam.

— The PHAI team
---
Trading involves risks: you can lose part or all of your capital. No returns are guaranteed. The data cited are historical backtests and are not indicative of future results.

subject: The noise that tricks 90% of traders
preview: Stai guardando il grafico sbagliato.
body:
[Nome], most people watch 5-minute charts. The result? **Pure noise**: emotional decisions, blown stops, panic.

We work on the **daily chart**. Few signals, but clean ones. PHAI watches the crossovers between price and 8 key lines: when price crosses them in a certain way, a pattern fires.

Easy to understand. Hard to execute with discipline — which is exactly why a machine does it, not your emotions.

Tomorrow: the part no one ever shows you. The losses.

— The PHAI Team
---

subject: I'll even show you the losing years
preview: Chiunque ti mostra solo i mesi belli. Io no.
body:
[Nome], anyone else will only show you the good months. I show you everything.

In our backtest on EURUSD 2010–2025 *(historical simulation)*, the system generated 783 trades with a 96.9% win rate. But it also had **losing years** (2017, 2023, 2025) and a maximum drawdown of around 20%.

Why am I telling you this? Because **a system that never loses doesn't exist**, and anyone who tells you that is lying.

The difference is that with PHAI, you see everything clearly, on the dashboard, in real time. See the track record for yourself 👉 {{demo}}

Tomorrow I'll reveal something counterintuitive about our system.

— The PHAI Team
---

subject: Why PHAI Sometimes Does NOTHING (And That’s a Good Thing)
preview: Confessione contro-intuitiva.
body:
[Nome], confession: there are weeks when PHAI **doesn’t open a single trade**. And that’s perfectly fine.

PHAI waits for the right setup instead of forcing trades to ‘do something’. Losing traders need constant action. Systems that last require **patience**.

And here’s the best part: you don’t have to endure the wait with anxiety. Open the app, see what the system is watching, ask the AI—and get back to living.

If you’re looking for a daily thrill, we’re not for you. If you want a serious system that works quietly, come back tomorrow.

— The PHAI Team
---

subject: What PHAI does while you live your life
preview: Una giornata tipo (e i piani).
body:
[Nome], here’s what a day with PHAI looks like:

• The EAs monitor up to 5 pairs on 2 engines (EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/CHF + the crosses EUR/GBP and GBP/CHF) and open/close according to validated patterns.
• Every move reaches your phone with a notification and a **clear explanation**.
• Open the app (available in 4 languages) to see your account, signals, and history. Have a question? Ask the AI assistant—it responds instantly.

No more black boxes. No more 'why did it do that?'.

You can start however you like: **Free Demo**, **Signals at €37/month** (manual signals), a **single strategy for €49**, or the **full Portfolio for €197**. Take a look for yourself 👉 {{demo}}

Tomorrow, I’ll answer the 6 questions I receive most often.

— The PHAI Team

subject: But does it actually work? Your 6 top questions
preview: Risposte oneste, senza giri di parole.
body:
[Nome], here are the 6 questions I always get — honest answers:

1. **Is it a scam?** No. That’s why we show our history, live drawdown, and a live Demo. Scams hide; we show.
2. **Do you guarantee profits?** No, and be wary of anyone who does. We guarantee the software: 30 days satisfied or your money back.
3. **I don’t understand trading.** The AI explains everything simply, in your own language.
4. **What if I lose?** We use a cautious profile, provide risk education, and are fully transparent. But trading involves losses: only invest what you can afford.
5. **Is it hard to install?** There’s a 5-minute guide; or we can do it for you.
6. **How much does it cost?** Try it free with the Demo. Tomorrow I’ll show you the full offer.

— The PHAI Team
---
